codeReview.summary: All 6 waitUntil call sites across 3 files were correctly replaced with fire-and-forget .catch() pattern. @vercel/functions was removed from all imports and package.json. /docs redirect is properly configured in next.config.ts with DOCS_URL env var support. No regressions detected in send/reply/webhook handlers. Error handling follows the specified pattern consistently. The lockfile was updated.

issues.description: DOCS_URL default differs from lib/config/app-url.ts. next.config.ts defaults to 'https://inbound.mintlify.dev/docs' while app-url.ts defaults to '${APP_URL}/docs'. This is functionally fine (the redirect catches /docs and sends to Mintlify, so links generated via app-url.ts still work via the redirect chain), but the different defaults could cause confusion. When DOCS_URL env var IS set, both use the same value.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The AGENTS.md already documents the waitUntil replacement pattern under 'waitUntil Replacement' section with the exact .catch() pattern used. Convention was followed correctly.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md 'waitUntil Replacement' section matches the pattern in send.ts:591, reply.ts:737, route.ts:490,853

sharedStateObservations.observation: DOCS_URL has two different default values in the codebase: next.config.ts defaults to 'https://inbound.mintlify.dev/docs' (the external Mintlify docs site) while lib/config/app-url.ts defaults to '${APP_URL}/docs' (the app's own /docs path). This works because the redirect catches the self-referential path, but it's an implicit coupling that could be documented in the library.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: next.config.ts:5 vs lib/config/app-url.ts:8 — different default values for DOCS_URL env var

summary: Clean implementation. All 6 waitUntil calls replaced with fire-and-forget .catch() across send.ts, reply.ts, and route.ts (handleScheduledEmail + handleBatchEmail). @vercel/functions fully removed from imports and package.json. /docs and /docs/:path* redirects added to next.config.ts using DOCS_URL env var with Mintlify default. Lockfile updated. No new lint or typecheck errors introduced. Worker followed the refactor-worker skill procedure correctly.
